Game.Name: Derby Stallion 96 (Japan)
Game.plot: Derby Stallion 96 is a Sports game, published by ASCII Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1996.Cheat: Sound Test & Reset DataAt the racing stable screen, press A to bring up a menu, then choose Time (third option) to access the Records screen. Press Select to go to the standings before pressing L + R + Select at the same time to access Iroiro Test of where you can choose either 00 Sound Test or 01 Reset Data.
Game.Notes: The ultimate goal of the player in the Derby Stallion games is to win the title of GI (Group I) Racer. To do this, the player must attempt to develop the greatest stock of horses that he can in order to have the greatest chance at each of the weekday and holiday races that compose the 1-year racing schedule of the fictitious "SRA" (an abbreviation of Sonobe Racing Association) group. Between races, the player engages in numerous business simulation, farm simulation, and role-playing activities. Derby Stallion 96 comes with an special cartridge that support updates with the satellaview system.
